response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to detect any vocal music. 2. Confirmed that the video contains only gameplay audio and the streamer's voice; no formal vocal music tracks are present. 3. Divided the video into 5 chronological scenes based on the streamer's activities: farming/harvesting, inventory management, traveling, and selling items. 4. Since no vocal music is present, all song-related fields are set to null and contains_vocal_music to false.
response.global_summary: The video features Takanashi Kiara playing Minecraft on a Hololive server. She is primarily focused on farming, harvesting, and selling crops like pumpkins and carrots at a market area to increase her in-game currency. No vocal music performances occur during this gameplay session.

scenes.description: Kiara is farming and harvesting crops in her Minecraft farm, talking to her audience.
Kiara organizes items in her chests and manages her inventory, including a shulker box.
Kiara travels to the market area within the game world.
Kiara interacts with a villager NPC to sell her harvested crops.
Kiara travels back from the market towards her farm.
